meaning: n.结尾,定局,终结,最后的事物,最后的言行
examples: There was a note of finality in his voice.
Young children have difficulty grasping the finality of death.
"I think, once there is a finality ... there's a certain sereneness about that, " McMahon said.
Stating any message point with strong conviction or finality will increase your odds of getting quoted.
